positive: Stylized whimsical illustration of a group of diverse forest animals (fox, badger, owl, rabbits) gathered around a luminous, oversized glowing pocket watch. The scene should be highly detailed, rendered in a vintage storybook aesthetic with bold outlines and flat color planes, utilizing a palette of deep forest greens, muted golds, cream, and pops of cyan. Composition is central and symmetrical, emphasizing clean silhouettes and strong contrast. The lighting is dramatic and ethereal, emanating from the glowing watch and deep shadows, suitable for a t-shirt graphic. Vector art style, flat design, clean lines, high resolution.
negative: low resolution, blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, poorly drawn, out of focus, jpeg artifacts, realistic photography, photo-realistic, logo, trademark, copyrighted characters
